##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/supplier/page-for-detail 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/supplier/page-for-detail 
 ## 接口描述 
供应商详情分页查询 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"10","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A71000%E6%9D%A1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"query","required":false,"label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"globalSearch","required":false,"label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E6%88%96%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E6%A8%A1%E7%B3%8A%E6%90%9C%E7%B4%A2","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"500"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supSts","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201%EF%BC%9A%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%EF%BC%9B%200%EF%BC%9A%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A8"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"availableOrgType","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%200%EF%BC%9A%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%201%EF%BC%9A%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"availableOrgId","required":false,"label":"%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8id","exampleValue":"CORx80000","desc":""}}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable>
